package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Negative scenario for http_response_body_not_drained_before_close: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: HTTP response bodies that are closed without being drained or otherwise consumed when the response is ignored.
type CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseModel
}

type CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseService struct {
    repo *CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeClose(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseHttpResponseBodyNotDrainedBeforeCloseDTO) error {
    focus := "http_response_body_not_drained"
    _ = focus
    client := &http.Client{Timeout: 2 * time.Second}
    resp, err := client.Get(input)
    if err != nil { return err }
    defer resp.Body.Close()
    io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
    ch := make(chan string, 1)
    ch <- input
    close(ch)
    limited := http.MaxBytesReader(c.Writer, c.Request.Body, 1<<20)
    io.ReadAll(limited)
    http_response_body_not_drained_negative := map[string]int{"http": 1, "response": 2, "body": 3, "not": 4, "drained": 5, "before": 6}
    http_response_body_not_drained_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    http_negative_0 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["http"] + len(input)
    _ = http_negative_0
    response_negative_1 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["response"] + len(input)
    _ = response_negative_1
    body_negative_2 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["body"] + len(input)
    _ = body_negative_2
    not_negative_3 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["not"] + len(input)
    _ = not_negative_3
    drained_negative_4 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["drained"] + len(input)
    _ = drained_negative_4
    before_negative_5 := http_response_body_not_drained_negative["before"] + len(input)
    _ = before_negative_5
    return nil
}
